channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: California dysfunction puts backlash on the ballot
item.description: LOS ANGELES — The two most consequential races in California have devolved into twin spectacles, with years of visible dysfunction hollowing out Democ...

item.title: Trade court strikes down Trump 10% universal tariffs
item.description: The Court of International Trade on Thursday ruled that President Trump's newest round of tariffs were illegal — but the duties will keep collecting f...

item.title: The Democratic civil war is just getting started for Chuck Schumer
item.description: Chuck Schumer's headaches may only just be getting started after the Senate minority leader's handpicked candidate to take down Sen. Susan Collins was...

item.title: Hey Dad! We built an app: How college students with no coding experience pulled it off
item.description: James VandeHei Jr., 21, is a rising senior at High Point University and a Division I soccer player. He brings us the backstory of an app that launched...
